T0039.title: Credit Easing
T0039.definition: A loosening of lending standards by a financial institution, making credit approval easier. This can involve lowering interest rates, reducing credit score requirements, relaxing restrictions on loan usage, or streamlining the approval process.
T0039.description: A loosening of lending standards by a financial institution, making credit approval easier. This can involve lowering interest rates, reducing credit score requirements, relaxing restrictions on loan usage, or streamlining the approval process.
T0039.usageExample: 内部消息，这两天XX银行大放水，无视查询次数，抓紧时间上车，晚了就关了。
